name: Chronicles of a war for the soul of the world: Operation Shattered Sky
description:
"The united nations has gathered in regard of the Lycanthria question and-"

The radio was cutted off with a exasperated sigh
"Why...Are we fighting for again? I don't like the sound of what they are planning. But hey...We will survive. Right, buddy?"

(This take place in the same universe as This one but at the start of the war and will follow different characters and stages of operation)

Operation Shettered Sky was simple on paper. The largest coalision that the world would have seen was to merge and organise a air fleet of bombers and jet fighther and break Lycanthria fighting capabilties and production.

This shall be the biggest air battle of the history. And with it. The first in many bloodbath that will follow. Thousands departed from the soil to never return. Here is their story and yours.
creator: Fɛnrir
